heading: Immediate funding to strengthen the health information technology infrastructure
label: 300jj–31 Immediate funding to strengthen the health information technology infrastructure

children.text: Health information technology architecture that will support the nationwide electronic exchange and use of health information in a secure, private, and accurate manner, including connecting health information exchanges, and which may include updating and implementing the infrastructure necessary within different agencies of the Department of Health and Human Services to support the electronic use and exchange of health information.

Development and adoption of appropriate certified electronic health records for categories of health care providers not eligible for support under title XVIII or XIX of the Social Security Act [ et seq., 1396 et seq.] for the adoption of such records.42 U.S.C. 1395

Training on and dissemination of information on best practices to integrate health information technology, including electronic health records, into a provider’s delivery of care, consistent with best practices learned from the Health Information Technology Research Center developed under , including community health centers receiving assistance under , covered entities under , and providers participating in one or more of the programs under titles XVIII, XIX, and XXI of the Social Security Act [ et seq., 1396 et seq., 1397aa et seq.] (relating to Medicare, Medicaid, and the State Children’s Health Insurance Program).section 300jj–32(b) of this titlesection 254b of this titlesection 256b of this title42 U.S.C. 1395
Infrastructure and tools for the promotion of telemedicine, including coordination among Federal agencies in the promotion of telemedicine.
Promotion of the interoperability of clinical data repositories or registries.
Promotion of technologies and best practices that enhance the protection of health information by all holders of individually identifiable health information.
Improvement and expansion of the use of health information technology by public health departments.

children.heading: Coordination
children.label: b Coordination
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure funds under this section are used in a coordinated manner with other health information promotion activities.

children.heading: Additional use of funds
children.label: c Additional use of funds
children.text: In addition to using funds as provided in subsection (a), the Secretary may use amounts appropriated under to carry out health information technology activities that are provided for under laws in effect on .section 300jj–38 of this titleFebruary 17, 2009

children.heading: Standards for acquisition of health information technology
children.label: d Standards for acquisition of health information technology
children.text: To the greatest extent practicable, the Secretary shall ensure that where funds are expended under this section for the acquisition of health information technology, such funds shall be used to acquire health information technology that meets applicable standards adopted under . Where it is not practicable to expend funds on health information technology that meets such applicable standards, the Secretary shall ensure that such health information technology meets applicable standards otherwise adopted by the Secretary.section 300jj–14 of this title
